title: Shorter Mace
description: Shorter Mace is a PvP-focused texture pack that makes Minecraft’s mace smaller, shorter, and easier to use in hand and GUI.
body:
# Shorter Mace

Tired of Minecraft’s giant, clunky mace getting in the way during PvP? **Shorter Mace** fixes that by making the mace **smaller, shorter, and easier to use**, while keeping the original vanilla style.

This pack improves visual clarity in combat without changing the color or overall design of the mace. Whether you're dueling, raiding, or just swinging for fun, **Shorter Mace** keeps your focus on your opponents, not a massive oversized weapon.

## Features
- Shorter, compact mace for better hand and GUI visibility
- Vanilla-friendly textures, fully compatible with Minecraft's default style
- Ideal for PvP, survival combat, and general gameplay

## Details
- **Supported Versions:** 1.16.5 → 1.21+  
- **Resolution:** 16×16 (Vanilla)  
- **Type:** Resource Pack  

Thanks for using **Shorter Mace**.  

Check out **[Swordpearl](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/swordpearl)** for more PvP-focused packs.
